title: lichen_l2.c:799 peer_remove logs removed EUI-64 after zeroing
description: Contract violation: lichen_peer_remove() - After secure_zero() clears eui64 at line 797, the LOG_INF at line 799 logs eui64[6] and eui64[7] which are now zero. This leaks no sensitive data (all zeros) but produces useless log output that doesn't identify which peer was removed. WHY this is a bug: The log is misleading and unhelpful for debugging. HOW to fix: Save eui64[6] and eui64[7] to local variables before secure_zero(), or log before zeroing.
close_reason: Duplicate of project-LICHEN-d7ub.1 - same logging issue
